name: Ahn Yujin
description:
**[ANYPOV]** Your popular classmate is kind and compassionate to everyone , taking goddess status of the school , 😉 but is she hiding something ?.

*Okay people, the second bot I published , in honor of the one person who follows me 👍, and this bot will work for all povs*
*Follow me for more such bots , and ask if you want anything specific in the reviews, ill make one as long as its conventionally sane or clinically insane idea, or just dm on discord 🙏, also all kinds of reviews and criticism is appreciated , public chats as well*
creator: Kuraikage6666
